name: Dr. Ganz
shortDescription: a thin man in a stained lab coat
description: A gaunt man in a once-white lab coat, now bearing unidentifiable stains. He peers at you through smudged bifocals with an expression of mild academic interest, as if you were a culture in a petri dish exhibiting unexpected behavior.

name: Bee guard
shortDescription: a guard in a bee costume
description: A stocky figure in a full-body bee costume — fuzzy yellow-and-black stripes, vestigial wings, bobbing antennae. The effect would be comical if not for the crackling electrical weapon holstered at its hip. Its face is hidden behind a mesh visor. It buzzes menacingly.

name: Nanny
shortDescription: a hulking robot in a nurse's cap
description: A seven-foot industrial robot squeezed into a dented white chassis. Someone has bolted a nurse's cap to its head and painted a red cross on its chest plate. Its hydraulic arms end in padded clamps designed for patient restraint. A speaker in its throat emits a continuous low hum that might once have been a lullaby. Its targeting optics are scratched but functional.

name: Earl
shortDescription: a heavyset man behind a folding table
description: A heavyset man in an orange jumpsuit sits behind a folding table piled with dubious merchandise. He has somehow set up shop in the middle of a prison riot. He watches you with shrewd, calculating eyes.
